stories.title: Takeaways: Thunder handle Lakers in Game 2 win
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next -- for the 76ers-Knicks, Cavs-Pistons, Wolves-Spurs and Lakers-Thunder series.

stories.title: Lakers' Redick rips refs; Reaves takes issue, too
stories.summary: Coach JJ Redick tore into the officiating after the Lakers' Game 2 loss to the Thunder, and guard Austin Reaves also expressed his displeasure.

stories.title: OKC up 2-0 on Lakers as Holmgren, SGA score 22
stories.summary: The Thunder took command of Thursday's Game 2 and the series against the Lakers with Shai Gilgeous-Alexander on the bench because of foul trouble.

stories.title: QB Heinicke retires after improbable NFL career
stories.summary: Quarterback Taylor Heinicke, who became a fan favorite during his two-plus seasons with the Washington Commanders, announced the end of an improbable NFL career.

stories.title: Vikings, Jennings agree to deal worth up to $13M
stories.summary: The Vikings agreed to terms with free agent receiver Jauan Jennings on a one-year deal worth up to $13 million, agent Drew Rosenhaus told ESPN.
